## Summary
Successfully renamed all occurrences in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/rewrite_cmd.py`:
**Changes Made:** - **Line 117**: Renamed parameter `plan_backend=` to `pr_backend=` - **Line 117**: Renamed attribute access `ctx.plan_backend` to `ctx.pr_backend`
**Final Result:** ```python # Before: plan_provider = PrContextProvider( plan_backend=ctx.plan_backend, remote_github=get_remote_github(ctx) )
